verses.1: I love you, LORD, my strength.
verses.2: The LORD is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer;
verses.3: I call on the LORD, who is worthy to be praised;
verses.4: The cords of death surrounded me.
verses.5: The cords of Sheol were around me.
verses.6: In my distress I called on the LORD,
verses.7: Then the earth shook and trembled.
verses.8: Smoke went out of his nostrils.
verses.9: He bowed the heavens also, and came down.
verses.10: He rode on a cherub, and flew.
verses.11: He made darkness his hiding place, his pavilion around him,
verses.12: At the brightness before him his thick clouds passed,
verses.13: The LORD also thundered in the sky.
verses.14: He sent out his arrows, and scattered them.
verses.15: Then the channels of waters appeared.
verses.17: He delivered me from my strong enemy,
verses.18: They came on me in the day of my calamity,
verses.19: He brought me out also into a large place.
verses.20: The LORD has rewarded me according to my righteousness.
verses.21: For I have kept the ways of the LORD,
verses.22: For all his ordinances were before me.
verses.23: I was also blameless with him.
verses.24: Therefore the LORD has rewarded me according to my righteousness,
verses.25: With the merciful you will show yourself merciful.
verses.26: With the pure, you will show yourself pure.
verses.27: For you will save the afflicted people,
verses.28: For you will light my lamp, LORD.
verses.29: For by you, I advance through a troop.
verses.30: As for God, his way is perfect.
verses.31: For who is God, except the LORD?
verses.32: the God who arms me with strength, and makes my way perfect?
verses.33: He makes my feet like deer’s feet,
verses.34: He teaches my hands to war,
verses.35: You have also given me the shield of your salvation.
verses.36: You have enlarged my steps under me,
verses.37: I will pursue my enemies, and overtake them.
verses.38: I will strike them through, so that they will not be able to rise.
verses.39: For you have armed me with strength to the battle.
verses.40: You have also made my enemies turn their backs to me,
verses.41: They cried, but there was no one to save;
verses.42: Then I beat them small as the dust before the wind.
verses.43: You have delivered me from the strivings of the people.
verses.44: As soon as they hear of me they shall obey me.
verses.46: The LORD lives! Blessed be my rock.
verses.47: even the God who executes vengeance for me,
verses.48: He rescues me from my enemies.
verses.49: Therefore I will give thanks to you, LORD, among the nations,
verses.50: He gives great deliverance to his king,
